hooks.command: HOOK="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/.claude/hooks/pre-web-check.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK" ]; then python "$HOOK"; else exit 0; fi
HOOK="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/.claude/hooks/work-check.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK" ]; then python "$HOOK"; else exit 0; fi

python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.pem','.key','.env','.secret','credentials.json']; match=[ext for ext in blocked if path.endswith(ext)]; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':f'Blocked: editing {path} — credential/secret file'})) if match else print(json.dumps({'decision':'allow'}))"
HOOK="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/.claude/hooks/prompt-guard.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK" ]; then python "$HOOK"; else exit 0; fi
HOOK="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/.claude/hooks/post-edit-check.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK" ]; then python "$HOOK"; else exit 0; fi
HOOK="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/.claude/hooks/session-start.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK" ]; then python "$HOOK"; else exit 0; fi
